allow: Bash(npx next *)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "Server is running. Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Server not ready yet: $_" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing; $content = $r.Content; if \($content -match "平行人生模拟器"\) { "✓ Title found" } else { "✗ Title missing" }; if \($content -match "开启平行宇宙"\) { "✓ Button found" } else { "✗ Button missing" }; if \($content -match "如果当初"\) { "✓ Preset found" } else { "✗ Preset missing" }; if \($content -match "noto-serif"\) { "✓ Font loaded" } else { "✗ Font missing" }; $content.Length)

PowerShell($body = '{"input":"如果当初我没离开北京"}'; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/generate" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing; $r.Content } catch { $_.Exception.Message; if \($_.Exception.Response\) { $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\)\); $reader.ReadToEnd\(\) } })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; $body = '{"input":"如果当初我没离开北京"}'; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/generate" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60; $json = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; "success: $\($json.success\)"; "storylines count: $\($json.data.storylines.Count\)"; $json.data.storylines | ForEach-Object { "  [$\($_.id\)] $\($_.title\)" } } catch { $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; $body = '{"input":"如果当初我没离开北京"}'; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/generate" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 90; $json = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; "--- Storylines ---"; $json.data.storylines | ForEach-Object { "`n[$\($_.id\)] $\($_.title\)"; "summary: $\($_.summary\)"; "events:"; $_.events | ForEach-Object { "  $\($_.year\): $\($_.description\)" }; $s = $_.snapshot; if \($s.Length -gt 300\) { $s = $s.Substring\(0, 300\) + '...' }; "snapshot: $s" } } catch { $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell($body = '{"input":"如果当初我没离开北京","gender":"female"}'; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/generate" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 90; $json = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $json.data.storylines | ForEach-Object { "  [$\($_.id\)] $\($_.title\) | $\($_.summary\)" } } catch { $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; 1..3 | ForEach-Object { $i = $_; try { $body = '{"input":"如果当初我没离开北京"}'; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/generate" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60; $json = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; "Run $i : OK \($\($json.data.storylines.Count\) storylines\)" } catch { "Run $i : FAIL - $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($body = '{"input":"如果当初我选择了另一份工作"}'; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/generate" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 90; "SUCCESS" } catch { "HTTP $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)"; $stream = $_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); $reader.ReadToEnd\(\) })
PowerShell(npm run *)

PowerShell($failures = @\(\); 1..3 | ForEach-Object { Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { $body = '{"input":"如果当初我走了另一条路"}'; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/generate" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 90; "OK" } catch { $stream = $_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); "FAIL: $\($reader.ReadToEnd\(\)\)" } })
Bash(npx @tarojs/cli@latest init miniapp --typescript --template default --description "平行人生模拟器")
Bash(npx taro *)
Bash(npx @tarojs/cli@latest init life-sim-weapp)

PowerShell(cd D:\\Project\\OPC; Write-Host "=== Git Log ==="; git log --oneline -8; Write-Host ""; Write-Host "=== Project Files ==="; Write-Host "Web API:"; Get-ChildItem src\\lib, src\\app\\api -Recurse -File | ForEach-Object { "  $\($_.FullName.Replace\("$pwd\\",''\)\)" }; Write-Host "MiniApp:"; Get-ChildItem miniapp\\src -Recurse -File | ForEach-Object { "  $\($_.FullName.Replace\("$pwd\\",''\)\)" })
PowerShell(Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object { $_.InterfaceAlias -notmatch 'Loopback' -and $_.IPAddress -notmatch '^169\\.' } | Select-Object IPAddress, InterfaceAlias)
PowerShell(netstat *)
PowerShell(New-NetFirewallRule *)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://192.168.110.6:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "Production server OK: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Failed: $_" }; Write-Host ""; Write-Host "=== Access Info ==="; Write-Host "PC: http://localhost:3000"; Write-Host "LAN: http://192.168.110.6:3000")

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://192.168.110.6:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; $html = $r.Content; Write-Host "Server: OK"; Write-Host "Has JS bundles: $\(if\($html -match '_next/static'\){'YES'}else{'NO'}\)"; Write-Host "HTML size: $\($html.Length\) bytes" } catch { Write-Host "Server down: $_" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; Write-Host "=== Page ==="; try { $page = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://192.168.110.6:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; $html = $page.Content; Write-Host "Page: OK \($\($html.Length\) bytes\)"; if \($html -match 'src="\(/_next/static/[^"]+\\.js\)"'\) { $jsUrl = $matches[1]; Write-Host "Found JS chunk: $jsUrl"; try { $js = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://192.168.110.6:3000$jsUrl" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "JS chunk: OK \($\($js.Content.Length\) bytes\)" } catch { Write-Host "JS chunk: FAIL - $_" } } else { Write-Host "No JS chunks found in HTML" } } catch { Write-Host "Page: FAIL - $_" })

PowerShell($oldServer = Get-Process -Name "node" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match "next dev" }; if \($oldServer\) { Write-Host "Killing old dev server..."; $oldServer | Stop-Process -Force }; Write-Host "Starting dev server..."; Start-Process -FilePath "npx" -ArgumentList "next dev --port 3000 -H 0.0.0.0" -WorkingDirectory "D:\\Project\\OPC" -WindowStyle Hidden)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://192.168.110.6:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "Server: OK"; $html = $r.Content; if \($html -match "mounted"\) { Write-Host "SSR shell mode: YES \(client-only rendering\)" } else { Write-Host "SSR: full render" }; Write-Host "Size: $\($html.Length\) bytes" } catch { Write-Host "FAIL: $_" })
